name: Hondo Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 16 oz. can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix the cream corn, whole kernel corn, cheese, crushed crackers, onion, egg, sugar, milk, and margarine until well combined.
3. Season with salt, pepper, and tabasco sauce to taste.
4. Transfer the mixture to a 3-quart baking dish.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 50 to 60 minutes or until golden brown and heated through.
